message:
fix(cli): harden config, clipboard, offline sync, and path handling

Multiple security and robustness fixes across the CLI package:

- config.ts: Block __proto__/constructor/prototype keys in get/set to
  prevent prototype pollution via crafted config paths
- config.ts (lib): Validate config sections independently so one
  corrupt section doesn't nuke the entire config back to defaults
- interactive.ts: Use atomicWriteFileSync for markdown export to
  prevent partial writes on crash
- clipboard.ts: Fix race condition where stdin.write could hang if the
  clipboard process exited early — now awaits both write and exit
  together via Promise.race
- utilities.ts: Detect wl-copy, xclip, and xsel separately on Linux
  instead of only checking xclip, improving Wayland support
- offline.ts: Replace check-then-overwrite lock acquisition with
  atomic wx-create + unlink-retry to close TOCTOU race window
- variables.ts: Strip Unicode replacement characters from truncated
  file reads instead of leaving broken multi-byte sequences visible
- semantic.ts (core): Use platform-aware path separators on Windows
  instead of always using forward slashes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
